task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new leave policy with the exact specified name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text field or list item in the AttendHRM interface displaying the policy name exactly as 'Grade A - Annual Leave Policy 2025'.

task_completion.description: Standard processing applied for target group assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown, checkbox, or assignment section indicating that the policy applies to 'Grade A' employees.

task_completion.description: Standard processing applied for Casual Leave.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Casual Leave' entitlement row or section. Verify the allocated days are set to '12' and the carry forward option is unchecked, set to 'No', or '0'.

task_completion.description: Standard processing applied for Sick Leave.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Sick Leave' entitlement row or section. Verify the allocated days are set to '10' and the carry forward option is unchecked, set to 'No', or '0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Earned Leave entitlement and carry forward configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Earned Leave' entitlement row or section. Verify the allocated days are set to '15' and the carry forward option is checked, set to 'Yes', or enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the AttendHRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual AttendHRM application windows, menus, and dialog boxes being interacted with, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are not mocked in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration must be visible within the HR software's native UI elements (tables, forms), not typed out in Notepad, Word, or a code editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the configuration was genuinely applied or saved in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of clicking 'Save', 'Apply', or the policy appearing in a master list of saved policies within the AttendHRM application.
